suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce that workers must include agent-browser verification evidence when a skill requires browser validation, and scrutiny should flag missing interactive evidence even if non-browser checks passed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for guest-browsing-and-trust-foundation notes that the original worker handoff omitted the marketplace-worker skill's required agent-browser evidence even though the later fix feature supplied it. See .factory/validation/guest-browsing-and-trust-foundation/scrutiny/reviews/guest-browsing-and-trust-foundation.json and the original handoff in the mission handoffs directory.
